missing_articles.title: Cliffs of Tumurru, Elizabeth M. Lauritzen

notes: Several files have content bleeding between articles. The Summer Morning on Temple Grounds article has severely garbled OCR text. Multiple home section recipes are mixed into poetry files. One poem (Cliffs of Tumurru) appears to be missing entirely from the extracted files.
